train_class: all valid exactly-two-channel ordered carriers with doubled spins in {1,2,3,4}, grouped by sorted external-spin quadruple
test_class: all valid exactly-two-channel representation families with doubled spins in {1,...,6}, containing at least one label 5 or 6, and absent from the train family set

descriptor.construction: permutation-invariant Reynolds orbit statistics over all valid ordered realizations in each external-spin multiset
descriptor.scalar_family_descriptor: orbit means and standard deviations of normalized external and channel Casimir features
descriptor.equivariant_augmented_descriptor: scalar family descriptor plus orbit means and standard deviations of F(theta0) entries, trace, determinant and entry second moment

stopping_rule: No feature addition, alpha tuning, family deletion, target transformation change or threshold change after evaluation.
evidence_rule: No statement from the Gemini advisory report is used as evidence.
